mapper.insert:
insert into invoice_apply (invoice_no,apply_type,target_id,
rider_name,
settle_no,invoice_amount, invoice_title,tax_no,status,create_time,update_time,order_id) values (#{invoiceNo},#{applyType},#{targetId},
#{riderName},
#{settleNo},#{invoiceAmount}, #{invoiceTitle},#{taxNo},#{status},#{createTime},#{updateTime},#{orderId})
